package rulecoverage

func NegativeCopyAppendIdiomWaste() string {
    ruleID := "copy_append_idiom_waste"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`dst = append(dst, src...)` when `dst` is known empty and `len(src)` is known"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
